testcase.name: verifyLogin

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.19.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: verifyLoginWithEmailAndPassword
testcase.system-out: 17:55:57.349 [main] INFO testCases.TC003_LoginViaEmailAndPwd - Launching browser: chrome 17:55:57.360 [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 145.0.7632.117 (resolved driver for Chrome 145) 17:55:57.367 [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as C:\Users\Prakash\.cache\selenium\chromedriver\win64\145.0.7632.117\chromedriver.exe 17:56:02.867 [main] INFO testCases.TC003_LoginViaEmailAndPwd - === Test Started : Login Via Email === 17:56:02.954 [main] INFO testCases.TC003_LoginViaEmailAndPwd - Login popup opened 17:56:05.764 [main] INFO testCases.TC003_LoginViaEmailAndPwd - Clicked Login via Email 17:56:06.628 [main] INFO testCases.TC003_LoginViaEmailAndPwd - Entered Email 17:56:06.717 [main] INFO testCases.TC003_LoginViaEmailAndPwd - Entered Password 17:56:06.819 [main] INFO testCases.TC003_LoginViaEmailAndPwd - Clicked Continue button 17:56:08.584 [main] INFO testCases.TC003_LoginViaEmailAndPwd - Checking confirmation message 17:56:08.612 [main] INFO testCases.TC003_LoginViaEmailAndPwd - Login successful : Logged in successfully as Salman ! 17:56:08.612 [main] INFO testCases.TC003_LoginViaEmailAndPwd - === Test Completed Successfully ===
testcase.system-err: Mar 15, 2026 5:55:58 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 145 Mar 15, 2026 5:55:58 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 145.0.7632.160. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.19.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
